inline_comments.message: I think we should be using Istanbul release version here.

By having istanbul release here, we are not going to test the change we are currently making, by default we are going to test Istanbul release, for which we already know the tests are ok.

This is the reason why I would not go with Istanbul release here and let the environment variable being set explicitly if a specific cps version needs to be tested.

ohk...
if so should the same (-latest) be used on line 121 for DMI plugin version?!

I don't think so.

Being in cps repo here, cps is build by the verification job and it generates cps latest image corresponding to the current change that is under test here. Hence latest cps image at line 100.

But dmi plugin is not part of this repo, then dmi latest image is not related to this change build at all. Either:
* dmi plugin latest does not exist if if was old and cleaned-up (this is the reason why the test is currently failing)
* or dmi plugin latest could also be a jakarta image related to any recent change in progress.
Either way, not really suitable to be used for istanbul integration testing.

Then I was thinking that the best dmi plugin image to use to run this istanbul integration test is latest istanbul dmi plugin image. Hence 1.0.3 dmi plugin image at line 121.

Some explanation can also be found in https://jira.onap.org/browse/CPS-879 description and comment.

Let me know if it clarifies the intent here.
